description: Ask a question and get a single AI-generated answer grounded in the knowledge base (POST /api/search/ask/simple).
rules: read-only: queries the server and runs an AI answer, mutates nothing persistent
writes the answer JSON to record_store/answer.json
degrades gracefully (status=unreachable, exit 0) when the server is down
usage: Set OPEN_NOTEBOOK_URL and ASK_QUERY. Output: answer.json.
limitation: Requires a reachable Open Notebook server with a configured AI provider for answer generation.

vars.ASK_QUERY: How does TMB predict checkpoint inhibitor response?
